original: All white bikinis are an uncommon fashion choice for terrans but quite popular among the darker-skinned races of the galaxy. This one has a number of fashionable white straps and a glossy finish that screams, “Look over here” while allowing its wearer a modicum of propriety. The ultralastic material is capable of stretching to contain everything from cute little bee-stings to a pair of XXL New Texan milk-tanks.
